MTN TO REINSTATE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 431.10-431.70, CCP 469-475, CCP 585-587.5 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, ANDRE' HEARING SET FOR APR-18-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANDRE' PATTERSON'S MOTION TO REINSTATE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 431.10-431.70, CCP 469-475, CCP 585-587.5. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SUFFICIENTLY DEMONSTRATED WHY THE COURT SHOULD REINSTATE HIS COMPLAINT. ON OCTOBER 12, 2012, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER SUSTAINING, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND THE DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT. ON MARCH 27, 2013, DEFENDANTS SERVED THE ORDER. ON JULY 25, 2013, PLAINTIFF SERVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF DID NOT AMEND HIS COMPLAINT. ON SEPTEMBER 17, 2013, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANTS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO DISMISS, WITH PREJUDICE, PURSUANT TO CCP 581(F). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Reinstate Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 431.10-431.70, Ccp 469-475, Ccp 585-587.5
Off Calendar Apr-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANDRE' PATTERSON's Motion To Reinstate Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 431.10-431.70, Ccp 469-475, Ccp 585-587.5 is denied. Plaintiff has not sufficiently demonstrated why the Court should reinstate his Complaint. On October 12, 2012, the Court issued an order sustaining, with 10 days leave to amend the demurrer and motion to strike the Complaint. On March 27, 2013, Defendants served the Order. On July 25, 2013, Plaintiff served Notice of Entry of Order. Plaintiff did not amend his Complaint. On September 17, 2013, the Court granted Defendants' unopposed motion to dismiss, with prejudice, pursuant to CCP 581(f). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Defts Motion For An Order Dismissing This Matter
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTS MARINELLA GONCALVES, DEEANNA CRESPO, CHERYL FIELDS, RACHIALLE FRANKLIN and DIEGO RIOS' Motion For An Order Dismissing This Matter is Granted. No opposition filed. As to the moving defendants, the Complaint is dismissed with prejudice pursuant to CCP 581(f). (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
